safe_synthesizer.reason: The cluster default http://localhost:8080 does not expose the Safe Synthesizer API and no NMP endpoint/token was configured.

nemo_evaluator.reason: The NeMo Platform SDK reported that the evaluator plugin could not be loaded; no deployed customer-support SLM endpoint was configured.

integrity_note: SQS and DPS remain null rather than being replaced with project heuristics. They must come from an authenticated Safe Synthesizer service job summary.
